---
name: Content update
about: Request copy, image, link, or page content changes
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What content needs to change?

## Page or area affected

Link, route, section name, or component.

## Current content

Paste the existing copy, link, image, or content if available.

## New content

Paste the exact replacement copy or describe the needed change.

## Reason for change

Why is this update needed?

## Deadline or timing

Is there a date this needs to be completed by?

## Assets or references

Attach docs, images, links, approvals, or related issues.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Content is updated
- [ ] Links/assets are verified
- [ ] Reviewed on desktop
- [ ] Reviewed on mobile
- [ ] Approved by content owner
